text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen, successfully held thanks
to the hard work of so many people, kicks off
without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower proclaims that she will give this race
everything she has before heading to the gates.
